privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task configures two offline payment methods in Magento: (1) Bank Transfer with title 'Wire Transfer / ACH', routing number 021000021 (real JP Morgan Chase routing number), account 9876543210 (synthetic test account), and sort order 10; (2) Check/Money Order with title 'Corporate Check', payable to 'TechCorp Solutions', mailing address at '123 Tech Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94107' (ZIP code verified as real), and sort order 20. All values are consistent across task description and metadata fields.
